publishedAbstract: `ceph-s` showing HEALTH_ERR, with the following line: ~~~ 1 MDSs report damaged metadata ~~~ The output of `damage ls` shows a result similar to the following: ~~~ # ceph tell mds.$filesystem:0 damage ls [{"damage_type": "backtrace", "id": 2091078454, "ino": 1, "path": "" ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph status shows HEALTH_ERR with MDSs report damaged metadata
